name: Abundant Growth
oracle_text:
Enchant land
When this Aura enters, draw a card.
Enchanted land has "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

name: Cathartic Reunion
oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard two cards.
Draw three cards.
flavor_text: The soldier had given up his wealth, his title, even his home, but he had no room for regret. At last, he had saved his friend.

name: Commander's Sphere
oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.
flavor_text: It harmonizes with the essence of its master.

name: Command Tower
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
flavor_text:
"The Path of Flame is a flamekin's most personal journey. You must walk it for yourself, but you'll never walk alone."
—Zasharua, Brighthearth mentor

name: Cultivate
oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
flavor_text: All seeds share a common bond, calling to each other across infinity.

name: Distant Melody
oracle_text: Choose a creature type. Draw a card for each permanent you control of that type.
flavor_text: In far-off Shadowmoor, her kin lifted their heads to a refrain they could not hear.

name: Fertile Ground
oracle_text:
Enchant land
Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional one mana of any color.
flavor_text: The true strength of nature is not the raging storm or the charging rhino, but the inexorable vitality of life.

name: Ingot Chewer
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, destroy target artifact.
Evoke {R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)
flavor_text: Elementals are ideas given form. This one is the idea of "smashitude."

name: Kodama's Reach
oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
"The land grows only where the kami will it."
—Dosan the Falling Leaf

name: Night's Whisper
oracle_text: You draw two cards and lose 2 life.
flavor_text:
"I have seen things that would reduce a weaker person to blubbering and raving. Want to hear about them?"
—Vraska

name: Opal Palace
oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. If you spend this mana to cast your commander, it enters with a number of additional +1/+1 counters on it equal to the number of times it's been cast from the command zone this game.

name: Path of Ancestry
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

name: Riveteers Overlook
oracle_text: When this land enters, sacrifice it. When you do, search your library for a basic Swamp, Mountain, or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle and you gain 1 life.
flavor_text: Along the outer girders, in gold filigree, are inscribed the names of all those who fell to their deaths during construction.

name: Smokebraider
oracle_text: {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast Elemental spells or activate abilities of Elementals.
flavor_text: "Be silent and listen to your inner fire. Only then can you walk the Path of Flame."

name: Terminate
oracle_text: Destroy target creature. It can't be regenerated.
flavor_text:
"I've seen death before. My mother succumbing to illness, my comrades bleeding on the battlefield . . . But I'd never seen anything as dreadful as that."
—Taani, berserker of Etlan

name: Terramorphic Expanse
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text: The Conflux crashed together far-flung continents, like ships colliding in a storm.

name: Thriving Bluff
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than red.
{T}: Add {R} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: As eons passed, the rock wore away, revealing the rich colors at the mountain's heart.

name: Thriving Grove
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than green.
{T}: Add {G} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: Far from human eyes, birds flit between vivid blossoms in a hidden paradise.

name: Thriving Heath
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than white.
{T}: Add {W} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: Wildflowers here bloom not with the season but with the ebb and flow of magic.

name: Thriving Isle
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than blue.
{T}: Add {U} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: All the wonders of the natural world in one breathtaking microcosm.

name: Thriving Moor
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than black.
{T}: Add {B} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: Beauty appears in strange places for those with eyes to see it.

name: Wickerbough Elder
oracle_text:
This creature enters with a -1/-1 counter on it.
{G}, Remove a -1/-1 counter from this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
flavor_text: "Living scarecrows make a mockery of the natural order. Dead ones make fine hats."
